rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, 'this is silly' flipped to 'because I want to and it makes me happy,' did it anyway. That's a round won on hard difficulty. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral two weeks running, change room choice made both times — that's a streak, not a coincidence. But the Apollo ring and necklace at work? Lost that one, and he knew exactly why before anyone asked — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading as obviously gay. Named clearly, which matters, but still lost.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud the moment his people — or work — are watching.
